title: (disguised) BETWEEN clause not recognised. Hence no rangejoin.
poc: SELECT t2.a FROM t t1, t t2 WHERE t2.a between t1.a and t1.b;
key_bug_features: BETWEEN clause not recognized in SQL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT, name VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, name) VALUES (1, 10, 'A'), (2, 20, 'B'), (3, 30, 'C');
CREATE TABLE range_table (start_value INT, end_value INT);
SELECT rt.start_value FROM range_table rt, test_table tt WHERE tt.value BETWEEN rt.start_value AND rt.end_value;
